text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Urara, there you are! ♪ Are you still fretting
about your sister's wedding?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone! And yeah, I am! Since she asked
me to plan it, I really want to make it special...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But what should I do to make it good?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, would you like to take a break and spend
some time with us?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
We could go out somewhere if you'd like. Maybe
you'll be able to find some inspiration!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Goooooal! Yay! That was an amazing race! Did you see that, Ikuno? Did you see what happened?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness! Urara's smiling again!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It seems watching this race provided her a
much-needed break. She really loves races,
doesn't she? ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The shopping district's really fun too. There's so
much stuff to browse!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Now that she's had a little breather, perhaps
something will provide sparks of inspiration for
her.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Urara, is that you?! When's your next race?
We'll all make sure to be there for you, holding
our banners and cheering you on!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yippee! I love all your support! Your cheers get me really excited before I start running and while I'm running, too!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: I believe our dreams lie up ahead! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! We sang that in perfect harmony! ♪ Talk
about being in sync!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's like our hearts are as one! I'm so happy!
Ahh, I'm suddenly super excited!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That was so much fun! Thanks for today,
everyone! I had such a great time!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I agree. It was a very fulfilling day. Incidentally,
have you had any ideas?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Nnnope! Not a single one! It's a real thinker, huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, what's wrong, Rice? Are you tired?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry. I wasn't any help.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I invited you out because I saw how hard you were
trying, and I thought that this might help you, if
only a little...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What? But you were a huge help! I mean...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I was really freaking out before, and now those
worries are gone!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It was so exciting hanging out with everyone, and
now I feel like I can really do my best again!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So you didn't get any ideas, but you got plenty of
excitement, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know, Urara, I bet your sister asked you to
help because she felt the same way.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? She felt the same way?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
And you, my little muse, are always doing your
very best to make things exciting, and when I
looked at you, I had a thought.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I see... So that's it! I totally get it now!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I thought I didn't get it, but I actually knew all
along what I should do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While heading to my office one day, I bump into
Haru Urara walking along with a sunny smile on
her face.
choice_data_list: You don't look so worried anymore.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I was able to solve my problem! I'm gonna
make my sister's wedding a super-exciting one!
choice_data_list: Is there anything I can do to help?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You wanna help? Really?! Okay, then let's look
up exciting races my sister would like!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, oh! I've gotta ask so many people for help
too! Hehe. There's so much to do!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Really? Thanks! Can I get a preview of your
cheering? Hehe.
choice_data_list: Go for it, Urara! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go for it 'cause I can do it! Urara, la la
la! ♪ Hehe, here I go!
